title: Untoggle sprint
description: Instead of sprinting when you hold the sprint key, this makes you walk when you hold it, and sprint when the sprint key is not held.
body:
## Archival
Due to limited success this mod won't receive further updates.  
I'm open to updating as a commission, whether to a specific Minecraft version or adding features.  
Create an issue on GitHub or contact me on Discord `@andyrusso` to discuss.

# Untoggle sprint
This mod changes the "Sprint: Hold" behavior to "Sprint: Untoggle".

What it does is: instead of sprinting when you hold the sprint key, this makes you walk when you hold it, and sprint when the sprint key is not held.

Make sure you have sprinting set to Untoggle.

No dependencies, no configuration.
___
I accept donations with gratitude on [my Boosty page](https://boosty.to/andyrusso) as one time donations and subscriptions. Subscribers get access to extra mods.  
Donations will help me maintain and make new mods more consistently. Thank you!
